description: Ability to solve mathematical problems including algebra, calculus, and number theory
Generating correct and efficient code from natural language specifications
Identifying and fixing bugs in provided code snippets
Understanding and extracting information from provided text passages
Comprehending written text and answering questions about its content and meaning
Drawing valid conclusions from given premises using formal logic rules
Applying deductive logic to derive conclusions from stated premises and rules
Applying everyday knowledge and intuition to answer questions about the world
Demonstrating understanding of scientific concepts across physics, chemistry, and biology
Producing original, engaging, and well-structured creative text
Accurately following complex multi-step instructions with constraints
Condensing long texts into accurate and concise summaries
Correctly invoking external tools, APIs, and functions based on task requirements
Understanding and generating text in multiple languages with cultural awareness
Appropriately refusing harmful requests and maintaining ethical boundaries
Maintaining coherent and contextually appropriate multi-turn conversations
Interpreting data, tables, and charts to draw accurate conclusions
Accurately recalling and presenting factual information
Maintaining performance under adversarial inputs, typos, and perturbations
Decomposing complex tasks into subtasks and executing multi-step plans
